gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/371)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/371)
text: قِيلَ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَزْعُمُ بَعْضُ النَّاسِ أَنَّ النُّورَةَ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ مَكْرُوهَةٌ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ حَيْثُ ذَهَبَ أَيُّ طَهُورٍ أَطْهَرُ مِنَ النُّورَةِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, raising it, said,

‘It was said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Some people are claiming that the waxing on the day of Friday is disliked’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is not where they are going (with it). Which cleanliness is more cleansing than the waxing on the day of Friday?’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah in a marfu‘ manner saying: “Someone said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Certain people consider applying Nurah (lime as hair cleaner) on Friday as undesirable.’ The Imam said, ‘It is not as they say. No other cleaner is a better cleaner on Friday than Nurah.’” (The following chapters are best explained by fatwa.)
